description: Paired 200-Agent A1 workday screen for the onset of conserved ride-hailing fleet competition.

classification_rules.competition_event: at least one ride-hailing capacity failure in the seed-weather run
classification_rules.collapse_event: at least one final transport_unmet activity after fallback
classification_rules.candidate_rule: highest fleet total with stable competition in at least one weather and below the collapse seed-share threshold

scope_notes: All fleet levels use A1 moderate age-weighted weather-exposure disutility.
Within each seed all fleet levels share identical Agents, activities, OD, weather and random priorities.
Fleet maps are spatially nested; reducing supply only removes vehicles.
Every zone retains at least one initial vehicle even in the 12-vehicle scenario because active empty repositioning is outside the model.
The selected candidate is a mechanism baseline, not a Shanghai fleet estimate or desired policy result.
